description_long: This is a tall, narrow apartment building with a dark exterior facade, featuring a regular grid of windows on all visible sides. The windows are arranged in vertical and horizontal alignment, with some windows illuminated in warm tones, suggesting occupancy and interior lighting. The building appears to have no visible balconies or decorative architectural elements, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The structure is likely constructed from reinforced concrete or steel with a dark cladding, typical of urban residential towers. The window frames are uniformly spaced, and the building's height suggests it accommodates multiple floors. There is no visible signage or entrance detail, emphasizing its simple, functional design.
description: A tall, narrow, dark-colored apartment building with a grid of evenly spaced windows, some of which are lit from within. The facade is minimalist and lacks balconies or ornate features.
description_view_0: This view shows a narrow side of the building with a single vertical column of windows, some illuminated.
description_view_1: This view displays the wider facade with multiple rows and columns of windows, several of which are lit, highlighting the building's main face.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also features a single vertical column of windows, mirroring the opposite narrow side.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite wide facade, again with a grid of windows and several illuminated, matching the main face seen in view 1.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, symmetrical grid pattern, with even spacing both vertically and horizontally across all visible facades.
